title: PaxStressia scenario meta file (rules/scenarios/<id>/scenario.json)
description: Scenario metadata. A scenario directory may also contain nodes.json, edges.json, factions.json, events.json (each REPLACES the top-level file of the same name) and constants.json (a PARTIAL override merged over the top-level constants). Files absent from the scenario directory fall through to rules/.

seat.description: Player seat for this scenario (e.g. France-analog).
